UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Swords card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Swords card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Swords card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Swords card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Swords card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Swords card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the journey of Moses leading his people to a new land, emphasizing the sense of hope and determination.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the parting of the seas as the main focus. Instead, focus on the journey and the promise of a new beginning.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Six of Swords card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, ethereal, ambient, hopeful, contemplative, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Swords card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Swords card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the reluctance of the boatman, the burden of the unwilling souls, and the obstacles that prevent them from reaching the distant shore.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the imagery of the swords as they may distract from the main theme of this card in the reversed orientation.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Six of Swords card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, minor, introspective, contemplative, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Swords card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Swords card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the weary yet determined journey of Odysseus, his calmer state despite sorrow, and the hope symbolized by the child.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the swords, as they represent challenges overcome rather than current obstacles.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Six of Swords card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, ethereal, hopeful, contemplative, growing, instrumental
